MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-14-25 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S PRAYER FOR RELIEF THAT IS SUBJECT TO THIS MOTION DOES NOT SEEK NONRESTITUTIONARY DISGORGEMENT BARRED BY KOREA SUPPLY CO. V. LOCJHEED MARTIN CORP. (2003) 29 CAL. 4TH 1134. DEFENDANT DOES NOT POINT TO ANY PART OF THE COMPLAINT (INCLUDING THE PRAYER) USING THE TERM "NONRESTITUTIONARY" OR POINT TO ANY SPECIFIC PARTS OF THE COMPLAINT THAT WOULD SUGGEST THAT "ALL FUNDS" SOUGHT IN THE PRAYER INCLUDE ANY ITEMS THAT MAY BE CHARACTERIZED AS NONRESITUTIONARY DISGORGEMENT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B) JUDGE: HARRY L. JACOBS ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT KENDALL PLATO , INDIVIDUALLY AND AS A TRUSTEE OF RICHARD AND KENDALL PLATO LIVING TRUST, ESTATE OF RICHARD J. PLATO DECEASED MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT is DENIED. Plaintiff's prayer for relief that is subject to this motion does not seek nonrestitutionary disgorgement barred by Korea Supply Co. v. Locjheed Martin Corp. (2003) 29 Cal. 4th 1134. Defendant does not point to any part of the complaint (including the prayer) using the term "nonrestitutionary" or point to any specific parts of the complaint that would suggest that "all funds" sought in the prayer include any items that may be characterized as nonresitutionary disgorgement.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the court's tentative ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: Harry L. Jacobs ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
